productName: LVR BOX 1g RESWILD - Mimosa Live Res
description: Premium hybrid live resin extracted from Mimosa that was flash-frozen fresh at harvest, locking in the volatile terpenes most concentrates lose to drying and curing. Saucy, vibrant, and intensely aromatic — with notes of citrus, orange, and grapefruit, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
